case_title: CHRISTIAN CHICAS VS. LOURDES MAAYAN PEREZ CHUMLEY

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
